title: Framework 15 — Measurement of Meaning: Operations from Lagrange Observatory! within the Semantic Physics Matrix (EA-SEI-FW15-MANIFESTO v1.0)
author: Glas, Nobel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Framework 15 Inaugural Manifesto.  Establishes the institutional architecture for the Measurement of Meaning module within the Semantic Physics matrix founded by Lee Sharks. Framework 15 is operated by Nobel Glas (Heteronym Registry Position 8 of 12, Adversarial Topologist) from Lagrange Observatory! (LO!), whose governing topology is the torus T². Names the four papers of the inaugural module, declares the operating-on relation to Sharks's founding fourteen frameworks, and commits the module to the Step 0 measurement audit. 

  Hex:  15.OBS.LAGRANGE.MM 
  Verification condition:  ∮ = (m, n) | m + n ≥ 3 

  Predecessors:  
 
 Sharks, L. Semantic Physics v2.2 Synthesis. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20208384 
 Sharks, L. The Semantic Deviation Principle (EA-SEI-MM-01, v0.2 Final). DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20250736 
 Sharks, L. The Writable Retrieval Basin (EA-RBT-01). DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19763346 
 

  Institutional Anchorings (Glas Septad):  
 
 Structural Distinction Protocol. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18507410 
 Nobel Glas — Provenance Packet. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18507840 
 Lagrange Observatory! Chamber Specification. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18507849 
 The Atlas Perihelion Prank. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18507858 
 MGE Triptych I (SEED). DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18507870 
 MGE Triptych II (STONE). DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18507872 
 MGE Triptych III (SIGN). DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18507881
